message:
test(engine): safety decisions, adversarial campaigns, fork detection, governance, and IR contract

safety_decision_router.rs (+417 lines):
  SafetyVerdict and SafetyAction serde roundtrips, routing decision
  determinism tests, escalation path validation, and verdict composition.

adversarial_campaign.rs (+225 lines):
  Serde roundtrips for CampaignError, CampaignComplexity, AttackDimension.
  Campaign lifecycle tests, attack surface coverage validation.

fork_detection.rs (+619 lines):
  ForkEvent aggregation and counting tests, fork chain reconstruction,
  detection threshold sensitivity, and deterministic event ordering.

governance_scorecard.rs (+142 lines):
  Scorecard metric computation, threshold enforcement, compliance evaluation
  tests with serde roundtrip coverage.

governance_hooks.rs (+130 lines):
  Hook trigger logic, event filtering, and governance action dispatch tests.

ir_contract.rs (+220 lines):
  IR type validation, schema version contract tests, canonical value
  serialization for instruction opcodes and function descriptors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
